meta.title: WaveWarz Voter Onboarding | W3M Creator Academy
meta.description: Beginner-safe onboarding for voting in the July 12 WaveWarz AI Music Tournament.

home.title: Get ready to vote in the July 12 WaveWarz AI Music Tournament.
home.body: Voting is free. You do not need crypto experience. This quick guide helps you set up Phantom before battle night so your vote is ready when the tournament opens.

readiness.title: Your voter readiness
readiness.body: Finish each step before July 12. A tiny amount of SOL may be needed for network activity, but voting itself is free.

successCallout.title: Good news for first-time voters
successCallout.body: Voting is free. You are not buying a vote. Phantom helps ensure votes come from real participants and reduces botting.

whyWallet.title: Why do voters need Phantom?
whyWallet.body: Phantom is a wallet app. For this tournament, think of it like a voter pass, not a trading account.
whyWallet.screenshotCaption: Future screenshot: simple side-by-side of a voter, Phantom, and a clean WaveWarz vote.

cards.title: Voting is free
cards.body: You are not buying a vote. The goal is to help the tournament confirm that real people are voting instead of bots.

cards.title: Cleaner voting
cards.body: Phantom helps reduce botting and keeps the vote cleaner by giving each voter a simple way to connect.

cards.title: Beginner warning
cards.body: Never share your Secret Recovery Phrase. WaveWarz, Web3 Metal, and Phantom should never ask for it.

completion.label: I understand why Phantom is used for voting.

installPhantom.title: Install Phantom before tournament day
installPhantom.body: Install Phantom only from the official app store or Phantom website. Do this before July 12 so you are not rushing during the battle.
installPhantom.screenshotCaption: Future screenshot: official Phantom download page or app store listing.

instructions.body: Search for Phantom in your phone's official app store.
Use the official Phantom browser extension.
Ignore ads, fake support accounts, and random download links.

completion.label: I installed Phantom or know where to install it safely.

createWallet.title: Create your wallet and protect your phrase
createWallet.body: You do not need crypto experience. Follow Phantom's setup prompts and protect the recovery phrase like a password that can never be reset.
createWallet.screenshotCaption: Future screenshot: Phantom wallet creation screen, with recovery phrase hidden.

callout.title: Do this slowly
callout.body: Write your Secret Recovery Phrase somewhere private. Do not screenshot it. Do not paste it into websites. Do not send it to anyone.

completion.label: I created my wallet and stored my phrase safely.

addSol.title: Know why a tiny amount of SOL may be needed
addSol.body: Voting is free, but the Solana network may require a tiny amount of SOL for network activity. This is not a ticket price or a payment to WaveWarz.
addSol.screenshotCaption: Future screenshot: Phantom balance area showing where network activity funds appear.

splitPanels.title: Keep it simple
splitPanels.body: You only need enough for basic network activity if the voting flow requires it. Beginners should avoid experimenting with extra crypto tasks before battle night.

splitPanels.title: Ask early
splitPanels.body: If you are unsure how much SOL is needed, ask the official WaveWarz or Web3 Metal community before July 12.

completion.label: I know voting is free and a tiny SOL amount may be for network activity.

connectWavewarz.time: Estimated time: 2 minutes on battle night
connectWavewarz.title: Connect to WaveWarz when the voting page opens
connectWavewarz.body: On battle night, use the official WaveWarz voting link. Phantom will ask you to approve the connection.
connectWavewarz.screenshotCaption: Future screenshot: WaveWarz connect wallet button and Phantom approval prompt.

instructions.body: Open the official WaveWarz voting page.
Choose Phantom and approve only what you understand.

completion.label: I know how I will connect Phantom to WaveWarz.

battleNight.time: Estimated time: 5 minutes once voting opens
battleNight.title: Battle night mission checklist
battleNight.body: The goal is to be ready before battle night, then vote calmly when the tournament is live.
battleNight.screenshotCaption: Future screenshot: battle night voting page, X Space reminder, and final vote confirmation.

missions.title: 1. Join the X Space
missions.body: Listen for live updates and timing.

missions.title: 2. Open wavewarz.com
missions.body: Use the official WaveWarz link only.

missions.title: 3. Connect Phantom
missions.body: Approve the voting connection when prompted.

missions.title: 4. Vote
missions.body: Pick your favorite AI music battle entry.

missions.title: 5. Enjoy the show
missions.body: Stay in the room and support the artists.

faq.title: Beginner FAQ
faq.body: Short answers for voters who are new to Web3.
faq.screenshotCaption: Future screenshot: where to find official WaveWarz and Web3 Metal community help.

items.question: Do I need crypto experience?
items.answer: No. This guide is built for complete beginners.

items.question: Does voting cost money?
items.answer: Voting is free. A tiny amount of SOL may be needed for network activity, depending on the voting flow.

items.question: Why Phantom?
items.answer: Phantom helps reduce botting and keeps the vote cleaner by making it harder for fake activity to flood the tournament.

items.question: What should I never share?
items.answer: Never share your Secret Recovery Phrase. Anyone who asks for it should not be trusted.

footer.help: Questions? Join the WaveWarz community or Web3 Metal community for help.
